sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ صَالِحٌ أَنْ يُسَافِرَ بِالسَّيَّارَةِ إِلَى الشَّمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Salih je odlučio putovati autom na sjever.
sentences.translationEn: Salih decided to travel by car to the north.

sentences.translation: Napunio je rezervoar gorivom prije polaska.
sentences.translationEn: He filled the tank with fuel before leaving.

sentences.translation: Putovao je satima i zaustavio se da se odmori i pojede.
sentences.translationEn: He drove for hours and stopped to rest and eat.

sentences.translation: Stigao je na sjever prije zalaska sunca.
sentences.translationEn: He arrived in the north before sunset.
